        "spotlight": "Won Bellewstown bumper (good to yielding) last April; there's been sufficient promise in his maidens to believe he might be competitive off this sort of mark, though he has been absent for over a year and looks the yard second string on jockey bookings."
      },

        "first_time_gear": [],

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Some promise in bumpers/maidens but offered little on switch to handicaps at Leopardstown (14-1)."

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Well held on first two starts over hurdles late last year but, after a respectable fourth back on the Flat (1m6f) in January, made a promising handicap debut over hurdles when keeping on for second at Huntingdon (2m4f, good) last month; 2lb rise looks fair and she is high on the shortlist."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "jockey": "Harry Bannister",
        "trainer": "Richard J Bandey",
        "ts": "90",

        "edge": "-8.3pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "14-race maiden but has returned to something near best on last two starts, finishing runner-up on both occasions, tried in a tongue-tie at Windsor (2m4f, good to soft) in November and without it at Plumpton (near 2m5f, soft) in February after a break; workable mark and should go well again."
      },

        ],

        "spotlight": "Failed to progress for previous stable last season and, having shaped with promise over C&D for new stable in January, took a backwards step at Huntingdon (2m4f, good) last month when finishing last of eight; needs the fitting of cheekpieces to get quickly back on track."
      },
      {

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Not progressing over hurdles and often undermines her chances by failing to settle, but has bits of form that bring her into the reckoning, notably when fourth at Wincanton (1m7f, good to soft) in February; still something to find and stamina to prove over this longer trip."
      },

      }

        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Capitalised on the drop back in trip to win at Huntingdon (2m, heavy) in February and followed up at Kempton (2m2f, good); he's 7lb higher than last time and in a hotter race, but did it very nicely and this 6yo novice is now 3-6 over fences; could still have more to offer and he's respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Matterhorn",
        "jockey": "Jay Tidball(5)",
        "trainer": "Paul Nicholls",
        "ts": "140",
        "rpr": "156",
        "or": "146",
        "form": "992-1P",
        "score": "58.7",
        "model_pct": "37.6%",
        "fair_odds": "2.66",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+10.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Made it 5-9 over fences with convincing win at Uttoxeter (2m4f, good) last May; pulled up on sole run since, at Ascot in December, but the good to soft ground may not have suited; second in this last year; could go well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Kotmask",
        "jockey": "Caoilin Quinn",
        "trainer": "Gary & Josh Moore",
        "ts": "150",
        "rpr": "158",
        "or": "130",
        "form": "552F23",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "12.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.22",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "P",
        "spotlight": "His jumping has been an issue this season and he was soundly beaten at Newbury last time; however, two starts ago he was a close second of four there (2m, good to soft) and he has a good record at this track; might not be far away if finding some fluency."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Edwardstone",
        "jockey": "Tom Cannon",
        "trainer": "Alan King",
        "ts": "127",
        "rpr": "155",
        "or": "151",
        "form": "4-4214",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.34",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-18.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "12yo whose career highlight came when winning the Tingle Creek in 2022; showed he retains considerable spark when winning Grade 2 at Kempton (2m4f, good) this January; he may prefer a longer trip than this nowadays but he's a leading player nevertheless now back in a handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Scorsese",
        "jockey": "Harry Atkins(7)",
        "trainer": "Neil Mulholland",
        "ts": "140",
        "rpr": "157",
        "or": "125",
        "form": "8F2133",
        "score": "55.1",
        "model_pct": "1.4%",
        "fair_odds": "73.50",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-23.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Made all at Sedgefield (2m3f, good to soft) on Boxing Day on fourth chase start and his good form has continued when third on both runs since (2m4f, soft/good to soft); this drop back in trip is worth a go and further improvement is possible, but he needs to be better than ever from 4lb wrong."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Fairyhouse",
    "time": "2:40",
    "race_name": "O'Driscoll's Irish Whiskey Juvenile Hurdle (Grade 2)",
    "type": "hurdle",
    "dist": "16.0f",
    "going": "Yielding To Soft",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Majolique",
        "jockey": "Paul Townend",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "141",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "score": "65.1",
        "model_pct": "40.1%",
        "fair_odds": "2.50",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Beat respected opposition in a 1m2f French race; reportedly surprised her connections in winning so well at Naas (1m7f, heavy) and expected to come on leaps and bounds for that; engaged in a Grade 1 at Aintree next week but runs here; Townend's chosen one."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Proactif",
        "jockey": "Mark Walsh",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "130",
        "rpr": "141",
        "or": "140",
        "form": "119",
        "score": "64.2",
        "model_pct": "31.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.17",
        "best_dec": "2.38",
        "edge": "-20.9pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Reportedly never travelled when a disappointing favourite in the Triumph; he did beat the Cheltenham winner Apolon De Charnie in France and he looked good when accounting for Macho Man here on his stable debut; if forgiven his Festival blip, then his credentials are clear to see."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Macho Man",
        "jockey": "Danny Mullins",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "126",
        "rpr": "136",
        "or": "135",
        "form": "12P",
        "score": "60.7",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.11",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Easy winner of his only hurdle run in France; inexperience evident when chasing home Proactif here in January (yielding; finished his race off well); only 12-1 for the Triumph and yet all hopes went west with a bad mid-race blunder after which he was pulled up; remains very promising."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Moulin Labbe",
        "jockey": "Brian Hayes",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "137",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "151",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "20.18",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "French bumper winner; weak in the betting when a remote fifth on his hurdle/stable debut but then odds-on when coming home 13l to the good at Navan (2m, heavy); raised in grade here but considered a chaser in the making and clearly open to vast improvement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Adrienne",
        "jockey": "Darragh O'Keeffe",
        "trainer": "T M Walsh",
        "ts": "124",
        "rpr": "131",
        "or": "120",
        "form": "313203",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "24.10",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+3.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "No great shakes in failing to win on the Flat but has won a maiden over hurdles and performed well in the face of some stiff tasks; however, this is another, and she's held by Majolique on Naas form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Harwa",
        "jockey": "Sean Flanagan",
        "trainer": "Paul Nolan",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "134",
        "or": "125",
        "form": "2210",
        "score": "53.7",
        "model_pct": "1.9%",
        "fair_odds": "51.53",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Twice runner-up in France; well on top late on to win his maiden here (heavy) and it was no great surprise to see him struggle in the Fred Winter off what looked a tough opening mark (good to soft; 28-1); others have superior form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "North Shore",
        "jockey": "Keith Donoghue",
        "trainer": "Gavin Cromwell",
        "ts": "126",
        "rpr": "142",
        "or": "133",
        "form": "340",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "1.4%",
        "fair_odds": "69.32",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-6.3pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "1m4f winner in France; twice beaten about 11l behind the smart Narciso Has and, for whatever reason, he didn't appear to give his true running in the Triumph (16-1); could easily be given another chance back in a Grade 2."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Minella Boss",
        "jockey": "Phillip Enright",
        "trainer": "Oliver McKiernan",
        "ts": "119",
        "rpr": "123",
        "or": "122",
        "form": "7421",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "1.3%",
        "fair_odds": "77.48",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Earned a modest mark on the Flat; promising to do better over hurdles as he bumped into useful opposition before winning his maiden on heavy ground at Gowran when tongue tied for the first time; this demands plenty more, however."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Kai Lung",
        "jockey": "Sean O'Keeffe",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "132",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1P",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "1.2%",
        "fair_odds": "83.00",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Consistent Flat horse in France; had the Fred Winter winner Saratoga back in third when winning his maiden at Naas (first-time hood; heavy) and unwise to read too much into his no-show in the Triumph (33-1) as he lost his position after mid-race interference; remains capable of better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Michonne",
        "jockey": "Donagh Meyler",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "116",
        "rpr": "132",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "72",

        "model_pct": "1.1%",
        "fair_odds": "93.51",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Bought for 185,000euros out of top French Flat yard for whom she won at 1m3f and 2m; well held in a Leopardstown maiden over Christmas but much better when second to Majolique at Naas and looks capable of holding her own at this level."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Hereford",
    "time": "2:45",

    "type": "hurdle",
    "dist": "16.0f",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "ts": "96",

        "or": "99",

        "fair_odds": "3.53",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Has been disappointing of late and can compromise her chances by over-racing, but would have strong claims if back to the form of her Newbury effort (2m, good to soft) in December, namely second to Cheltenham Festival winner White Noise; worth a second look with promising claimer Daire McConville back in the saddle."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Getaway With You",
        "jockey": "Nick Slatter(3)",
        "trainer": "David Killahena & Graeme McPherson",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "232514",
        "score": "44.9",
        "model_pct": "18.0%",
        "fair_odds": "5.56",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+13.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won three in a row in November/December (2m3f-2m4f) and scored at Chepstow (2m3f, soft) in February; well-held fourth eight days later at Ffos Las, possibly finding the quick turnaround too much; may resume progress, though the drop in trip is a slight concern."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Kingdom Of Stars",
        "jockey": "David Bass",
        "trainer": "Kerry Lee",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "PU63",
        "score": "42.4",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.28",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-11.4pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Has taken time to come to hand over hurdles but his recent third over 2m4f here last month represented by far his best effort, appreciating the better ground; opening mark is no gift, but he remains capable of better in this sphere; interesting contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Desert Halo",
        "jockey": "Harry Bannister",
        "trainer": "Richard J Bandey",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "-4U731",
        "score": "41.9",
        "model_pct": "11.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.88",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Hasn't taken to fences this season but came right back to form reverting to hurdles last time, gaining a hard-fought win at Plumpton (2m, good to soft), his first success of any kind; handles most ground and 3lb rise leaves him still well treated on the pick of last season's hurdling form; leading contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Bongo Man",
        "jockey": "Joe Anderson(3)",
        "trainer": "Billy Aprahamian",
        "ts": "42",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "-383P2",
        "score": "40.0",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.06",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+2.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Initially failed to show any immediate benefit from wind surgery in three subsequent runs (2m to extended 2m4f) but latest effort, fitted with a tongue-tie and going close at Huntingdon (2m, good) last month, was a marked step forward; it will be interesting to see if he can build on that and 3lb claimer is booked."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Bouquet De Paris",
        "jockey": "Tom Bellamy",
        "trainer": "Rebecca Curtis",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "6554",
        "score": "38.1",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.42",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "BF_SHORT",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Shaped with promise in juvenile hurdles in December, and although his run last month on handicap debut was a shade disappointing, the heavy ground likely counted against him; hood worn the last twice is retained, and a better showing can be expected from this 4yo returned to a more suitable surface."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Lord Chamberlain",
        "jockey": "Robert Dunne",
        "trainer": "Dominic Elsworth",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "036",
        "score": "37.4",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.44",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Five-race Flat maiden; clear pick of his three hurdle runs when third of seven at Ludlow (2m, good to soft); needs to leave behind a lesser effort at Huntingdon (2m, good) last time when ridden more prominently, but he brings potential now stepping into handicaps."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "For Old Times Sake",
        "jockey": "Richie McLernon",
        "trainer": "Neil Mulholland",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "-87869",
        "score": "35.4",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.17",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-15.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Has yet to match his Irish point promise in five hurdle races, but did take a step forward on handicap debut in a hood at Huntingdon (2m, heavy) in February before disappointing when a well-backed favourite upped to 2m5f back there the following month (good, hood removed); may do better in time, but difficult to recommend on recent form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Ramaah",
        "jockey": "James Best",
        "trainer": "Sarah-Jayne Davies",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "4755P3",
        "score": "34.6",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.59",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+4.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "1m5f AW Flat winner who has shown only a modest level of ability in a dozen runs over hurdles (2m-2m3f); produced one of his better efforts when third over C&D last month, though beaten 16l; probably place claims at best from out of the weights."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Granny B",
        "jockey": "Charlie Price",
        "trainer": "Michael Mullineaux",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "439586",
        "score": "30.5",
        "model_pct": "1.8%",
        "fair_odds": "55.01",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Yet to win in 15 starts over hurdles, having shown some promising placed efforts last summer before her form dipped in the autumn, and she was last seen finishing lame (well held) at Stratford in October; returns on a competitive mark, but with a bit to prove."
      },
      {

        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Fair Flat racer who was placed in Listed races at Wetherby (2m, good) and Newbury (2m, soft) on her first two hurdling starts; below that form in another Listed race in January but still very much the one to beat here."
      },

        "rank": 2,

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Placed in two junior bumpers towards end of last year (good to soft/soft), but was remote when third on hurdling debut at Market Rasen (2m, good to soft) and needs to improve to trouble an on-song Tralee Girl."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "rpr": "-",

      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Fitzroy Gardens",
        "jockey": "Joshua Thompson(5)",
        "trainer": "Micky Hammond",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "63",

        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+6.9pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won on the AW in Ireland in the autumn (1m4f; RPR 76) and bettered inauspicious stable/hurdle debut (wore cheekpieces) when third of eight (albeit well held) at Catterick (1m7f, good; blinkers refitted) last month; can collect another minor prize here."

        "trainer": "Faye Bramley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "score": "40.8",

        "spotlight": "Sole success came in 2m handicap here in December on soft; followed that up with a solid second over 20.5f (gd-yld) at Leopardstown and just 2lb higher here; struggled at 2m on testing ground the last twice, but interesting now back up in trip at the scene of his only win with Cobden taking over."

        "spotlight": "Won at this meeting last year after a break and has generally held form well since, adding wins over hurdles at Listowel and on the Flat at Thurles; went close at Galway in October on last run over timber and just 2lb higher here; pleasing return on the Flat at Navan last week; interesting."

        "spotlight": "Three-time hurdle winner won a novice chase at this meeting last year; third on seasonal return in a Navan handicap hurdle but last two efforts over fences have not been encouraging; back over timber now and new headgear combination needs to revive."
      },

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Five-time winner at 2m-2m1f with three of those wins coming at Cartmel; is 3lb below the most recent of those victories, but his last few efforts have not been his best and this trip raises questions."

        "spotlight": "Second runner for local yard; sole win came here over 2m4f (yld-sft) in January 2025; below par this season until producing a fine run to finish a close third at Cork (2m4f, yielding) in first-time cheekpieces (discarded); 3lb wrong here but rider's claim negates that; can't be discounted."
      },

        "spotlight": "With top yard but has failed to build on his September Navan maiden hurdle victory (2m5f, yielding); beaten 27l and then pulled up in first two handicaps at Leopardstown on contrasting ground; others preferred."

      }

        "spotlight": "Won on handicap debut over C&D (good to soft) in December and followed up at Fontwell (2m1f, good to soft) 11 days later, before clear second to well-handicapped winner at Kempton (2m5f, good to soft) in February; he's up 4lb for last time but the form reads very well and he could settle better in a first-time hood; lots to like."

        "spotlight": "7yo who has a fair bit of experience but has been progressive for a new yard this term, making it two wins from his last three runs (2m3f/2m5f, good/good to soft) when scoring at Warwick last time; entitled to respect."

        "spotlight": "Good-ground bumper runner-up who improved with each of his first four runs over hurdles, easily winning a maiden here (2m, soft) in February; pulled up in the competitive EBF Final at Sandown (2m4f, soft) since and needs to prove his stamina, but pedigree provides hope; not written off."

        "spotlight": "Point winner who scored on his hurdle debut at Taunton (2m3f, good) in December; 28l fourth of 15 in Kempton novice (2m5f, good to soft) since but this unexposed 6yo makes his handicap debut off what looks a fair mark and he could have more to offer."

        "spotlight": "Began to look exposed in the second half of last year but he showed improved form to win at Kempton (2m, good) on March 23 and was short-headed at Ludlow (2m, good) last Monday; he should be fine now back up in trip and could again be thereabouts."

        "sp_flag": "",

        "spotlight": "Course bumper winner who easily made all on handicap debut at Windsor (2m4f, good) on New Year's Day; unplaced/pulled up in Grade 2/Listed races on heavy/soft going on her two starts since but she could be an entirely different proposition now back in a handicap and back on better ground."
      },

        "sp_flag": "",

        "spotlight": "Good-ground bumper winner who got off the mark over hurdles at the third attempt over C&D (good) in November, when wearing first-time cheekpieces (retained) in a maiden that worked out extremely well; weakened into sixth on handicap debut at Windsor in January but that was on soft ground; firmly in calculations now back on a better surface."

        "spotlight": "Won a bumper at Fontwell (2m1f, good) last May and followed up on hurdle debut over C&D (good to soft) in December; however, he's been pulled up/well beaten in his first two handicaps and needs to get back on track."

        "spotlight": "Useful Flat performer who made good start to hurdling career in the autumn, including when going close in a Cheltenham novice (2m4f, good to soft; has won on good ground); flopped at Ascot (2m5f, good) in November but has had a break since and retains potential now in his first handicap hurdle."

        "spotlight": "Irish bumper winner (yielding) who followed up on hurdle/stable debut at Uttoxeter (2m, heavy) in December, and he was disputing the lead and clear of the rest when falling at the final flight on handicap debut at Doncaster (2m, good to soft) last time; the winner has followed up off 6lb higher so a 4lb rise for this fellow may well prove lenient; every chance he'll stay."

      }

        "spotlight": "Smart novice who wasn't beaten far by Kopek Des Bordes in a maiden before beating the smart William Munny next time out (on soft); finished behind Storm Heart and Farren Glory in the Grade 3 Red Mills at Gowran (heavy) but ran well after a long absence and he should be considerably sharper here; 3lb better off with Storm Heart."

        "spotlight": "Triumph favourite two years ago (finished fifth); very lightly raced in the meantime and firmly on an upward curve in winning twice on heavy ground (including a Grade 3) before an admirable third in the 2m5f handicap at Cheltenham (good to soft) where he would have been closer but for hitting two out; top connections haven't got to the bottom of him yet; clear claims."

        "spotlight": "Better than ever this season and has contested two Grade 1s; appreciated the drop in class when making all in a Grade 3 at Naas (2m, heavy) and this 7yo is a good bet to give his running (stays this far); very sound jumper."

        "spotlight": "Admirably consistent handicapper who didn't run too badly when midfield in the County Hurdle last month; however, this is a step up the ladder for him and regular rider Jack Kennedy evidently prefers the chances of The Yellow Clay."

        "spotlight": "Doubled her tally under rules when emerging from off the pace to narrowly win the Grade 3 Quevega at Punchestown (2m4f, soft); this is appreciably more demanding against male opposition and has her work cut out at the weights."

        "spotlight": "Supreme winner two seasons ago; 0-7 in the meantime and has been chasing, last time beaten the thick end of 20l when one of the favourites for the 2m4f handicap at Cheltenham; if this return to hurdling and the first-time cheekpieces float his boat, then he might not be far away."

        "spotlight": "High class novice last season who was second to The New Lion in the 2m5f Grade 1 at Cheltenham; later suffered a heavy fall at Punchestown; this campaign hasn't really got off the ground and departed too far out (three from home) in the 2m5f handicap at the Festival (Storm Heart third) to know how he would have fared, though was going well enough at the time; wouldn't be a surprise to see him get his career back on track."
      }
    ]

        "spotlight": "Won sole Irish point and two of three novice hurdles (both 2m3f, good to soft); shaky transition to fences but she jumped soundly in a five-runner Newbury race in February before stopping to nothing under pressure; wind surgery since could have helped; retains potential."

        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Hurdle winner on soft but two chase wins in 2025 were on good to soft, latterly at Cheltenham (about 2m4f) in December, and failures since have come on heavy and soft; needs to jump better than she did at Ludlow in February (over 17l behind Malaita) but she could revive back on good ground."

        "spotlight": "Has a fondness for Fakenham and she put up a good show when winning her second chase on that track (2m5f, good to soft) in January from out of the weights; has continued in form there since but others might be stronger finishers away from that track."

        "spotlight": "Two chase wins at about 2m4f in early 2024 (soft and good); has not found life easy this winter but 3m found her out on her latest start (first-time tongue-tie; cheekpieces now added) and the return to shorter on good ground should suit; bold bid likely."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Dual Flat and dual hurdle winner when based in France but didn't achieve much when third in 1m7f novice hurdle on British debut in November (first run after long absence) and was pulled up in a subsequent handicap (1m7f); has a lot to prove on first venture beyond 2m6f; had wind op in February."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Abbey Law",

          "cheekpieces"
        ],
        "cd": "C",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won 2m maiden hurdle here (good) last April but both handicap runs over that trip this year have been very disappointing; getting back on good ground ought to aid her cause, but she failed to convince stamina-wise when tried over 2m5f last spring and has even further to go today; cheekpieces added."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "trainer": "Louise Allan",

          "tongue_tie"
        ],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Maiden point winner in 2024; showed no significant promise in maiden hurdles this season (2m-2m4f; refused to race on one occasion) and is 14lb out of the weights for this handicap debut; needs combination of longer trip and new tongue-tie to enable significant improvement."
      },

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won a chase here (2m5f, good) last May and returned to form with 66-1 second in soft-ground C&D hurdle in December; safely held twice since and too inconsistent to rely upon, but still features prominently in calculations."
      },

        "spotlight": "Well beaten in latest qualifying race (raced too freely) but her midfield finish at Kempton (2m, good to soft) two starts ago was promising, and her pedigree suggests she'll be suited by this hike up in trip on her handicap debut."
      }
    ]
  },

        "sp_flag": "",

        "spotlight": "Useful track performer at best with 3-4 record in points since last October; capable of better than he showed when fourth in a hunter chase run at Thurles in January; subsequently beat record-breaking pointer Winged Leader at Nenagh, with Whacker Clan a distant third; sights lowered after Cheltenham Festival bid."
      },

        "spotlight": "Achieved a high standard in his prime for Henry de Bromhead; three wins over fences, including at Grade 2/3 level; unconvincing form in points in recent months, beaten favourite in three of his last four races."

        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Four-time chase winner, including two Grade 3s; pulled up in a Grade 3 here on penultimate start but bounced back straight away with a Grade 3 win at Naas (2m, heavy); came up short in this last year when a 7.25l third and needs to find more to feature at the finish."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Down Memory Lane",
        "jockey": "Mark Walsh",
        "trainer": "Gordon Elliott",
        "ts": "147",
        "rpr": "165",
        "or": "151",
        "form": "24-01P",
        "score": "64.7",
        "model_pct": "26.1%",
        "fair_odds": "3.83",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+5.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won his bumper here; both chase wins have come at Navan; won a 20.5f Listed handicap chase on testing ground there off 144 in December; disappointed when third-favourite for the Plate Handicap at Cheltenham; better than that and has a good chance at the weights; can't be discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Found A Fifty",
        "jockey": "Jack Kennedy",
        "trainer": "Gordon Elliott",
        "ts": "159",
        "rpr": "167",
        "or": "162",
        "form": "11434P",
        "score": "63.6",
        "model_pct": "21.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.66",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-12.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Eight-time chase winner; beat Majborough and Energumene at Cork in December; won this race last year, holding off the late challenge of Saint Sam (Blood Destiny a 7.25l third); pulled up in the Champion Chase last time, but this is more his level and he is the one to beat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Saint Sam",
        "jockey": "Danny Mullins",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "125",
        "rpr": "165",
        "or": "155",
        "form": "222-P3",
        "score": "61.8",
        "model_pct": "15.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.50",
        "best_dec": "6.75",
        "edge": "+1.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Six-time chase winner but no success since a Grade 2 win at Clonmel in November 2024; ran a cracker in this last year to finish a 0.75l second behind Found A Fifty; below par in both runs this season and needs to leave those tame efforts behind."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Energumene",
        "jockey": "Paul Townend",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "142",
        "rpr": "164",
        "or": "153",
        "form": "2P3-34",
        "score": "58.4",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.93",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-19.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "High class operator in his pomp; has won eleven chases, including six at the top table; however, it seems like time is catching up with the 12yo and he was well held by Found A Fifty at Cork in December; tailed off at Leopardstown on latest in first-time cheekpieces (discarded); last ran at this trip in 2020; others preferred."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Sa Fureur",
        "jockey": "Danny Gilligan",
        "trainer": "Gordon Elliott",
        "ts": "23",
        "rpr": "162",
        "or": "149",
        "form": "-47420",
        "score": "44.4",
        "model_pct": "0.7%",
        "fair_odds": "151.09",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "2-6 over fences; won the Navan Listed handicap in 2024, that Down Memory Lane won last year, off 143, which was his last success; excellent effort in the Grade 2 Red Mills at Gowran in February when a 1.25l second behind Impaire Et Passe; well beaten in the Martin Pipe latest but the return to chasing is a plus; a fair bit to find on the figures, however."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Easy win at Wincanton (3m2f, heavy) in January and bounced back from Haydock flop to win at Exeter (3m6f, good) recently, despite a bad mistake; clearly on the up and his stable has won two of the last six runnings."

        "spotlight": "Three wins in small fields this season (2m5f-3m5f, good/soft) and another good run when second of three at Sedgefield (3m2f, good) recently; however, there's a suspicion this 12yo will find today's race too competitive."

        "spotlight": "Kicked off 2025 with two wins in a row here (3m1f/3m4f, soft), including this race, and he reappeared with another win at Sandown (2m4f, good) in November; has continued in good form since in the main; chance."

        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Exploited a reduced mark to win at Bangor (3m5f, soft) in February and again had plenty in hand at Hexham (4m, soft) 12 days ago; this is a hotter race than last time and this 10yo is up 10lb, but he's clearly in rude health and could be bang there once more; handles any ground."

        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Tapped back into last season's promising form, and then some, to win by 12l in a first-time visor at Musselburgh (3m7f, good to soft; Edinburgh National) in February; has also won on good ground and 2-2 over hurdles here; an 8lb rise may not stop him if the visor maintains its positive effect."
      },

        "cd": "C",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "P",
        "spotlight": "Won two in a row here (3m1f, good) last spring to take his Plumpton record to 3-4; rallied for close third of five at Kempton (3m, good) in January, hinting this first crack at a marathon trip could be a good move, especially around here; soundly beaten at Ascot last time but over hurdles."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],

        "sp_flag": "OS_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won two in a row last May (3m5f/3m3f, good) and returned to form to win at Wincanton (3m1f, good to soft) last month following a break; this 9yo has never defied a mark this high but it may be within range if he's once more at the top of his game."
      },

        "edge": "-2.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent and pulled up in first-time blinkers at Exeter (3m6f, heavy) in February; however, he's back in cheekpieces today in which he kept on for second of six at Wincanton (3m1f, heavy) in January; versatile ground-wise and this sort of trip may yet suit; not discounted."
      },

        "spotlight": "Won the Southern National (3m3f, good) in November 2024 and he's on a dangerous mark on form as recent as October 2025; however, this 10yo hasn't threatened since and needs to raise his game."

      }

        "spotlight": "Front-runner who bids to complete a Fakenham hat-trick after two wide-margin wins in two-finisher contests this year (3m5f, soft/3m, good to soft); the value of his form is tricky to evaluate and today's faster ground may not be ideal but, nevertheless, another bold bid seems likely."

  {

          "tongue_tie"
        ],

        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won good-ground maiden (C&D) and novice hurdles last spring but he ran poorly on handicap debut here in between and his form at this level since hasn't borne much fruit (first-time tongue-tie latest, blinkers now added); however, he may well do better on second run back from a break with Sam Twiston-Davies taking over."
      },

        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "French Flat winner in 2024; maiden hurdler who is proving hard to place in handicaps, albeit his latest defeat, over C&D last month, came at the hands of one who'd dropped a long way in the weights; needs more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "100",

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won Southwell bumper in February 2025; bled from the nose at Lingfield in January but has been ready to run since February and an earlier run, a promising runner-up to a useful one at Huntingdon (2m, good to soft) in November, suggests he will be competitive on handicap debut."

        "spotlight": "Useful on the Flat, won 1m4f Salisbury handicap in 2023 off a mark of 88; more off days than on in the meantime but soft ground no help on recent yard debut after nearly two years off; worth a market check off a very low mark now back on more suitable ground; cheekpieces refitted."
      }

  },

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Shaped well on handicap chase debut at Navan when third to The Lovely Man (3m, soft to heavy); built on that when winning at Punchestown (2m7f, soft to heavy); took advantage of his lower hurdles mark on his next start; maintained progression in winning a valuable novice handicap at Navan; may remain competitive under a 9lb penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Irish point winner in 2024; won on the first of two starts over hurdles last season; made winning chase debut at Carlisle in November; suffered a reverse at Cheltenham before making amends with two 3m Ascot wins, in a handicap and the Grade 2 Reynoldstown; good jumper with considerable potential for improvement,"
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "cd": "C",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won two small-field chases (including a Grade 2) at Navan last season and third in the Brown Advisory; faded from three out when sixth behind Haiti Couleurs in this race last year; ran in two small-field races at Navan in February; rider's claim takes some of the sting from his hefty burden; one of six for the stable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Point and hurdles winner; ordinary form in opening chase runs; signs of promise in his third on handicap chase debut at Naas in January (2m4f, heavy); well backed in a Listed handicap at the same venue on his next start, landing the gamble despite some sloppy jumping; just run out of it in the 3m1f Leinster National last time; perhaps not sure to stay this far."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "MH",
        "spotlight": "Achieved a peak rating of 135 over hurdles; midfield when beaten 20l on chase debut at this venue; little impression when beaten almost 30l in fourth at Leopardstown; much improved when beating two shorter-priced stablemates at Gowran; confirmed the form of that race with Soldier In Milan when landing a Grade 3 event at Thurles."
      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Lightly-raced 10yo whose initial chase win came in a 2m4f Newcastle handicap in 2023; more recently won a 3m1f Ayr handicap hurdle early last year; seasonal return over fences at Cork in November was encouraging; bounced back from a poor Haydock run when winning a Listed handicap chase over an extended 2m5f at Leopardstown."
      },

        "spotlight": "Made amends for a fall on his chasing debut with wins in a beginners' event at Punchestown in December and Naas Grade 3 in January (extended 3m, heavy); struggled in the Brown Advisory (won by stablemate Kitzbuhel) on ground that was probably too lively; one of seven for the stable."

        "spotlight": "Hurdles form comprised 2m/3m wins (including Listed) either side of a comprehensive defeat in the Turners at the 2025 Cheltenham Festival; still a maiden after four runs over fences; decent placed form linked to Flicker Of Hope and Soldier In Milan; faded from the last when fifth (third best of yard's runners) in the Jack Richards at Cheltenham."

        "spotlight": "Smart hurdler who has taken really well to chasing; won a 2m4f beginners' event at this venue (heavy) and relished step up to an extended 3m at Naas when outstaying odds-on favourite Kurasso Blue on soft in January; flopped in a Grade 3 won by Argento Boy at the same venue later that month."

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Fifth in last year's Pertemps Final and ended the season with a creditable third in a handicap hurdle at the Punchestown festival; this season's chase win came in a match at Southwell and he had run only in small-field races over fences until a lively display to take third place in the 3m6f National Hunt Chase on his handicap debut."

        "spotlight": "Very useful hurdler at up to 3m (rated 132); yet to win over fences, but not disgraced in Grade 1 behind Final Demand at Limerick in December; third behind two smart types in Navan Grade 2 at Navan; kept ticking over with a hurdles run last month."

        "spotlight": "French hurdle winner; useful form in defeat in four chase starts last season, was lying second when falling at the last in Limerick handicap chase on return at Christmas; got away with a 2lb rise for a very easy success in a Listed chase at Thurles."

        "spotlight": "In top form this season, won a handicap hurdle off 108 at this venue in November; followed up by beating Will Do narrowly in the Porterstown Chase here in December (3m6f, yielding to soft); left in the lead at the final fence in the Thyestes before being overhauled by Now Is The Hour (3m1f, heavy); probably found 2m3f inadequate over hurdles on latest."

        "spotlight": "Point winner in 2024; bumper winner at Punchestown last April (2m3f, yielding); clinically abnormal when pulled up on chasing debut; not beaten far in fourth behind C'Est Ta Chance at Gowran (2m4f, heavy) in January; game winner from Kiss Will over 2m7f at Punchestown; fairly tame effort behind C'Est Ta Chance at Thurles; could bounce back to produce a big run."

        "spotlight": "Four wins last season included 2m4f Grade 3 Tipperary novice; also finished third to Dinoblue at Cheltenham; reappeared with a fine third in the Galway Plate in July; pulled up in Kerry National, two veterinary excuses offered; managed a creditable third in the Thyestes despite a couple of sluggish jumps; Jack Kennedy aboard."

        "spotlight": "Impressed with a 15l win over 2m5f at this venue in December on second chase start; two lesser runs followed in Grade 3 races; travelled well for a long way in the Kim Muir before weakening in the last half-furlong; that raises a doubt about his stamina."

        "spotlight": "Third in the Ultima at Cheltenham (3m1f, soft) in March 2023; in good form this season; ran respectably in the Welsh National (3m6f, good to soft) and Haydock Grand National Trial (3m4f, good to soft); had all but one of the Irish challengers behind when a fine third in the Kim Muir."

        "spotlight": "Runner-up in the Martin Pipe Handicap Hurdle in 2024; 0-7 over fences but he returned to form when third in a big-field handicap at Leopardstown (extended 2m5f, soft) in February; failed to run to expectations in the Kim Muir (9-2 chance), but unwise to discount; trainer's sole runner."

        "spotlight": "2-4 over hurdles; modest form in beginners' chases; much improved when a neck second over 3m at Down Royal on second handicap start, underlining the stamina shown when winning two points and a 3m hurdle; failed to build on that in the Grand National Trial at Punchestown; appreciated better ground when landing the 3m4f Ulster National; has picked up an 8lb penalty."

        "spotlight": "Came good over fences at last year's Punchestown festival in a 23-runner extended 3m7f handicap, winning by 15l; took a hefty 14lb rise for that; never dangerous on seasonal return at Leopardstown and pulled up in the Thyestes; needs to jump better than when fourth in the Leinster National."
      },
      {
        "rank": 26,
        "horse": "Sa Majeste",
        "jockey": "Aidan Kelly(3)",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "158",
        "or": "135",
        "form": "P-40P3",
        "score": "46.3",

        "fair_odds": "116.80",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Dual chase winner last term and ran a fine race in the Kim Muir over 3m2f at Cheltenham; pulled up in this last year, and struggled this season until showing definite signs of a return to form when third in the 3m1f Leinster National at Naas last month."
      },
      {
        "rank": 27,
        "horse": "Weveallbeencaught",
        "jockey": "Patrick M O'Brien(5)",

        "fair_odds": "135.45",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Best effort this season when second in the Munster National in October (3m, yielding to soft); has a bit to find with Monbeg Genius on running in the Kim Muir (finished seventh), but closely matched with The Enabler and Waterford Whispers on that showing."
      },
      {

        "ts": "108",
        "rpr": "157",
        "or": "139",

        "score": "42.0",
        "model_pct": "0.5%",
        "fair_odds": "200.70",
        "best_dec": "151.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Peak form includes a clear second to subsequent Grand National winner Nick Rockett in Thyestes Chase at Gowran (3m1f, soft to heavy) for Gavin Cromwell last season; pulled up in the Troytown on stable debut and has continued to struggle; failed to take to the cross-country course at Cheltenham."
      },

      }

        "spotlight": "Inconsistent since opening chase account in a beginners' at Naas in December (2m4f, heavy); ran well when a 5.75l fourth of 14 in a valuable handicap at Punchestown in February but pulled up at Cheltenham on latest; capable of better and preferred by Jack Kennedy."

        "spotlight": "Bumper and two-time hurdle winner; 0-14 in chases but has run well in defeat at times, most notably over 3m6f at the Cheltenham Festival in 2025 and when a neck second in the Porterstown here last November (3m6f, yielding); out of sorts in three runs since, though, and needs to rediscover best."

  {
    "course": "Fairyhouse",

      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "spotlight": "The clearcut winner of a Dromahane point in early December (soft) and has joined a good yard for rules action; any market confidence should be noted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Charismatic Kid",
        "jockey": "Mr H C Swan",
        "trainer": "Gordon Elliott",
        "ts": "108",
        "rpr": "130",
        "or": "-",

        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-13.3pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Bought for \u00a3300,000 soon after winning a Navan bumper in early December; he took a tall reputation into a Grade 2 at Leopardstown in early February and was backed accordingly, only for his effort to peter out after briefly threatening up the straight; the runner-up wasn't beaten that far at Cheltenham and this 5yo surely has a lot more to offer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Poetisa",
        "jockey": "Mr P W Mullins",
        "trainer": "W P Mullins",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "127",

        "fair_odds": "13.55",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Changed hands for \u00a3300,000 after winning a Cheltenham bumper last April for Toby Bulgin; runner-up in two hurdles (one a Listed) and a bumper for Willie Mullins, performing to a useful level; gets weight off male opposition this time and she may appreciate not having to contend with heavy ground (weather permitting)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Soul Asylum",
        "jockey": "Mr R James(7)",
        "trainer": "Gordon Elliott",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "128",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "21",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.33",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-7.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Narrowly failed to win his only point and then fetched \u00a3280,000 at the sales; difficult to know what he achieved at Punchestown (heavy) as he dictated a modest pace in a tiny field, though the second has since come out and finished runner-up in a big-field maiden hurdle; this son of Walk In The Park is unexposed and promising."
      },
